The classification of Reissekia cordifolia is based on its morphological characteristics, such as its leaf shape and flower structure.

intro: Reissekia cordifolia, also known as Heartleaf, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant is valued for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and wounds. The bioactive constituents of Reissekia cordifolia include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
